profile.title: Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer
profile.tagline: 10+ years building scalable web, mobile & enterprise solutions with .NET Core, Angular, React and Cloud.
about: I am a Computer Engineer and Senior Full-Stack Developer with over 10 years of experience building web, mobile, and enterprise applications. Throughout my career I have worked with a wide technology stack, with a strong focus on C#, .NET Core, Angular, React, SQL Server, and Microservices, alongside cloud experience in Azure and AWS.

I am passionate about designing and developing scalable, secure, and maintainable solutions that generate real business value. I have contributed to international projects in sectors such as enterprise resource management, LIMS (laboratory information management systems), and mobile applications — bringing not only technical expertise, but also teamwork, effective communication, and technical leadership.
I am always learning new technologies and best practices, with the aim of staying current and delivering innovative solutions.

description: Development of applications with microservices architecture.
Maintenance and new feature development for a LIMS (Laboratory Information Management System) application.
Maintained scripts that import samples and export results between the LIMS and other services.
Maintained a predictive container fill calculation application.
Maintained and extended a package distribution management system built with ASP.NET Core and React.
Developed a notification management application for print services.
Maintained WordPress sites for Seden and Newtral.
Built a web frontend for the Personio API for Habitissimo.
Developed a mobile application for sales management and automated fiscal data submission to the Chilean tax authority (SII).
Built with Ionic and Angular for the frontend and AWS + Python for backend services.
Developed a dashboard application to display live financial data from the Versat accounting system.
Built a new version of the HR contracting management application for the Ministry of Tourism, migrating the legacy Java system to .NET.
Designed and developed an IT asset management and user support ticket system.
Built a vehicle and personnel access control application.
Developed a contracts management and execution tracking system.
Built a modular enterprise platform including document management, accounting integration, warehouse inventory, fixed assets, and payroll modules.
Designed and developed ModularApp: a plug-in NuGet-based web platform with modules for cash management, sales, gym, beauty salon, and inventory.
Built a restaurant/bar management web app with simplified accounting for small businesses.
Developed a web app for warehouse stock requests and integration with the Versat accounting system.
Created a hotel restaurant reservation management system.
Built various other web applications: veterinary clinic, raw materials purchasing, bonsai rental, and clothing manufacturing/sales.
Network administration, application support, and IT security management.

1.description: Five-year computer engineering degree covering software engineering, algorithms, databases, networks, and systems design.

2.degree: SQL Fundamentals · C# · HTML · Java · Cloud Computing · Software Architecture Patterns
2.description: Series of professional certifications covering SQL, C#, HTML fundamentals, Java, The Complete Cloud Computing, and Software Architecture Patterns.

1.description: Designed and developed a modular web platform using distributable NuGet packages to compose features. Modules included: cash management, product sales, gym management, beauty salon, and inventory control.

2.description: Maintained and enhanced a Laboratory Information Management System (LIMS). Developed import/export scripts bridging the LIMS with external services, and built a predictive container fill calculation tool.

3.description: Cross-platform mobile app for sales management and automated electronic invoice submission to the Chilean tax authority (SII), with cloud backend on AWS.

4.description: Built a full enterprise platform for a thermoelectric power plant: document management, contracts, vehicle access control, IT asset ticketing, and accounting integration modules.
